Show / Hide Table of Contents

Interface IToolTipController

Describes a tooltip controller which provides functionality to manage and display tooltips for controls.

This interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics UI library and is not intended to be implemented by consumer code.

Inherited Members
IDisposable.IsDisposed
IComponent.Site
IComponent.Disposed
IDisposable.Dispose()
Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.ToolTips
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IToolTipController : IDisposable, IComponent, IDisposable
Remarks

The IToolTipController allows you to customize the appearance and behavior of tooltips displayed for controls and their elements.

You can configure visual aspects as well as behavior (such as display delays, visibility duration, and positioning).

The controller supports both regular tooltips and rich tooltips (IRichToolTip).

Controls that support tooltips expose a tooltip controller, which can be used to show, hide, and customize tooltips for those controls.

Consumer code can obtain an instance of IToolTipController using the CreateController() method. The lifetime of the tooltip controller instance is managed by the consumer.

Properties

Active

Gets or sets whether the component’s functionality is enabled.

Declaration
bool Active { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if displaying tooltips is allowed; otherwise, false.

AllowHtmlText

Gets or sets whether HTML formatting tags can be used to format text in tooltips.

Declaration
bool AllowHtmlText { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if HTML tags can be used to format text in tooltips; otherwise, false.

AutoPopDelay

Gets or sets the time, in milliseconds, that a tooltip remains visible.

Declaration
int AutoPopDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

An int value that specifies the tooltip duration.

CloseOnClick

Gets or sets whether a tooltip is closed on a click.

Declaration
bool CloseOnClick { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

A bool value that specifies whether a click on a tooltip closes this tooltip.

InitialDelay

Gets or sets the time interval between a visual element being hovered, and its tooltip being shown on-screen.

Declaration
int InitialDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

An int value that specifies the time a visual element needs to display its tooltip.

IsIconSizeLarge

Gets or sets whether the tooltip icon size is large.

Declaration
bool IsIconSizeLarge { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if the displayed icon size is large; otherwise false.

KeepWhileHovered

Gets or sets whether a displayed tooltip remains visible while the mouse cursor keeps moving (without pauses) towards the tooltip and while it hovers the tooltip.

Declaration
bool KeepWhileHovered { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if a tooltip remains displayed while the mouse cursor is over this tooltip; otherwise, false.

ReshowDelay

Gets or sets the time interval that must pass before another hint is displayed if another hint is currently visible.

Declaration
int ReshowDelay { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

An int value specifying the time interval in milliseconds.

RoundRadius

Gets or sets the radius of the rounded corners of the tooltip window.

Declaration
int RoundRadius { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
int

An int value that specifies the radius of the rounded corners.

Rounded

Gets or sets whether the tooltip’s corners are rounded.

Declaration
bool Rounded { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true to display hints with rounded corners; otherwise, false.

ShowBeak

Specifies whether callout beaks are displayed for hints.

Declaration
bool ShowBeak { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if the callout beak is displayed when a hint appears; otherwise, false.

ShowShadow

Gets or sets whether the tooltips are shown shadowed.

Declaration
bool ShowShadow { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
bool

true if the tooltips are shown shadowed; otherwise, false.

ToolTipAnchor

Gets or sets whether tooltips are anchored relative to the mouse pointer or relative to the owning control.

Declaration
ToolTipAnchor ToolTipAnchor { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipAnchor

A ToolTipAnchor value that specifies whether tooltips are anchored relative to the mouse pointer or relative to the owning control.

ToolTipLocation

Gets or sets the tooltip location.

Declaration
ToolTipLocation ToolTipLocation { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipLocation

A ToolTipLocation value that specifies the tooltip location relative to the mouse cursor.

ToolTipType

Gets or sets the type of tooltips displayed by the controller.

Declaration
ToolTipTypes ToolTipType { get; set; }
Property Value
Type Description
ToolTipTypes

A ToolTipTypes value that specifies the tooltips displayed by the controller.

Methods

AddClientControl(Control, IToolTipControlClient)

Registers a control to enable tooltip support using the specified client.

Declaration
void AddClientControl(Control control, IToolTipControlClient client)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

The control for which tooltips should be displayed.
IToolTipControlClient client

An IToolTipControlClient that provides tooltip information for elements within the control.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the control or client is null.

ContainsClientControl(Control)

Determines whether the specified control is contained by this controller.

Declaration
bool ContainsClientControl(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control to evaluate.
Returns
Type Description
bool

true if the specified control is contained by this controller; otherwise false.

GetRichToolTip(Control)

Gets the rich tooltip associated with the specified control.

Declaration
IRichToolTip GetRichToolTip(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which the rich tooltip is to be obtained.
Returns
Type Description
IRichToolTip

The IRichToolTip associated with the control, or null if no tooltip is assigned.
Remarks

Use this method to retrieve the instance of IRichToolTip that has been associated with the specified control using SetRichToolTip(Control, IRichToolTip) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
SetRichToolTip(Control, IRichToolTip)

GetTitle(Control)

Gets a regular tooltip’s title displayed within the specified control.

Declaration
string GetTitle(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control whose regular tooltip’s title is to be obtained.
Returns
Type Description
string

A string representing a regular tooltip’s title for the control.
Remarks

Use this method to retrieve title text that has been associated with the specified control using SetTitle(Control, string) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
SetTitle(Control, string)

GetToolTip(Control)

Gets a regular tooltip text for the specified control.

Declaration
string GetToolTip(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control whose tooltip text should be obtained.
Returns
Type Description
string

A string representing a regular tooltip for the control.
Remarks

Use this method to retrieve the regular tooltip text that has been associated with the specified control using the SetToolTip(Control, string) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
SetToolTip(Control, string)

GetToolTipAnchor(Control)

Gets whether the tooltip associated with the specified control is anchored relative to the mouse pointer or the owning control.

Declaration
ToolTipAnchor GetToolTipAnchor(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which to retrieve how the associated tooltip is anchored.
Returns
Type Description
ToolTipAnchor

A ToolTipAnchor value that specifies how the tooltip associated with the specified control is anchored.
Remarks

Use this method to retrieve the ToolTipAnchor value that has been associated with the specified control using the SetToolTipAnchor(Control, ToolTipAnchor) value.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
SetToolTipAnchor(Control, ToolTipAnchor)

GetToolTipIconType(Control)

Gets the type of the icon displayed within the specified control’s regular tooltip.

Declaration
ToolTipIconType GetToolTipIconType(Control control)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control whose tooltip’s icon type is to be obtained.
Returns
Type Description
ToolTipIconType

A ToolTipIconType value representing the type of the icon displayed within the specified control’s regular tooltip.
Remarks

Use this method to retrieve the ToolTipIconType value that has been associated with the specified control using the SetToolTipIconType(Control, ToolTipIconType) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
SetToolTipIconType(Control, ToolTipIconType)

HideHint()

Hides the hint if it is being displayed.

Declaration
void HideHint()

RemoveClientControl(Control)

Removes the specified client so that controller no longer listens to its events for displaying tooltips.

Declaration
void RemoveClientControl(Control client)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control client

The control to remove from this controller.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the client is null.

ResetAutoPopupDelay()

Resets the timer which controls when a tooltip’s window is hidden.

Declaration
void ResetAutoPopupDelay()
See Also
AutoPopDelay

SetAllowHtmlText(Control, bool)

Sets whether HTML formatting is enabled in tooltips for the specified control.

Declaration
void SetAllowHtmlText(Control control, bool value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which the tooltip information is to be changed.
bool value

A bool value that specifies whether HTML formatting is enabled in tooltips for the specified control.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.

SetRichToolTip(Control, IRichToolTip)

Associates the specified rich tooltip value object with the specified control.

Declaration
void SetRichToolTip(Control control, IRichToolTip value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control that is to be associated with specified rich tooltip.
IRichToolTip value

An instance of IRichToolTip to associate with the control.
Remarks

An instance of IRichToolTip that has been associated with the specified control can be retrieved using GetRichToolTip(Control) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
GetRichToolTip(Control)

SetTitle(Control, string)

Sets a regular tooltip’s title for the specified control.

Declaration
void SetTitle(Control control, string value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which to set a regular tooltip’s title.
string value

A string representing a regular tooltip’s title.
Remarks

The title text that has been associated with the specified control using this method can be retrieved using GetTitle(Control) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
GetTitle(Control)

SetToolTip(Control, string)

Sets a regular tooltip text for the specified control.

Declaration
void SetToolTip(Control control, string value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which to set the tooltip.
string value

A string representing a regular tooltip’s text.
Remarks

A regular tooltip text that has been assigned to specified control using this method can be retrieved using GetToolTip(Control) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
GetToolTip(Control)

SetToolTipAnchor(Control, ToolTipAnchor)

Sets whether the tooltip associated with the specified control is anchored relative to the mouse pointer or the owning control.

Declaration
void SetToolTipAnchor(Control control, ToolTipAnchor value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

The Control from which to set how the tooltip is anchored.
ToolTipAnchor value

A ToolTipAnchor value that specifies whether the tooltip is anchored relative to the mouse pointer or the owning control.
Remarks

The ToolTipAnchor value that has been associated with the specified control using this method can be retrieved using GetToolTipAnchor(Control) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
GetToolTipAnchor(Control)

SetToolTipIconType(Control, ToolTipIconType)

Sets the type of the icon displayed within the specified control’s regular tooltip.

Declaration
void SetToolTipIconType(Control control, ToolTipIconType value)
Parameters
Type Name Description
Control control

An instance of Control for which the icon type is set.
ToolTipIconType value

A ToolTipIconType value representing the type of the icon that should be displayed within the specified control’s regular tooltip.
Remarks

The ToolTipIconType value that has been associated with the specified control using this method can be retrieved using GetToolTipIconType(Control) method.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
GetToolTipIconType(Control)

ShowHint(IToolTipControlInfo)

Displays a hint using the specified tooltip information.

Declaration
void ShowHint(IToolTipControlInfo info)
Parameters
Type Name Description
IToolTipControlInfo info

An instance of IToolTipControlInfo that specifies the tooltip information.

ShowHint(string, Point)

Displays a hint at the specified position relative to the mouse cursor.

Declaration
void ShowHint(string toolTip, Point cursorPosition)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string toolTip

A string that contains text to display as a tooltip.
Point cursorPosition

A Point relative to which the hint should be displayed.

ShowHint(string, string, Control, ToolTipLocation)

Displays a hint with the specified text and title relative to the specified control.

Declaration
void ShowHint(string toolTip, string title, Control control, ToolTipLocation toolTipLocation)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string toolTip

A string that contains text to display as a tooltip.
string title

A string that contains text to display as a tooltip's title.
Control control

An instance of Control for which to display the tooltip.
ToolTipLocation toolTipLocation

A ToolTipLocation that specifies the position relative to the specified control at which the tooltip should be displayed.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.

ShowHint(string, Control, ToolTipLocation)

Displays a hint relative to a specific control.

Declaration
void ShowHint(string toolTip, Control control, ToolTipLocation toolTipLocation)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string toolTip

A string that contains text to display as a tooltip.
Control control

An instance of Control for which to display the tooltip.
ToolTipLocation toolTipLocation

A ToolTipLocation that specifies the position relative to the specified control at which the tooltip should be displayed.
Remarks

The tooltip is displayed relative to the specified control using the current IToolTipController settings.

Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown when the specified control is null.
See Also
HideHint()

Events

HyperlinkClicked

Occurs when a user clicks a hyperlink within a control’s tooltip or rich tooltip.

Declaration
event EventHandler<ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs> HyperlinkClicked
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<ToolTipHyperlinkEventArgs>

QueryObjectInfo

Raised when tooltip information is requested for a control element.

Declaration
event EventHandler<ToolTipControllerQueryInfoEventArgs> QueryObjectInfo
Event Type
Type Description
EventHandler<ToolTipControllerQueryInfoEventArgs>
Remarks

Handle this event to provide custom tooltip content for elements of a control registered via AddClientControl(Control, IToolTipControlClient).
